name: LaCROIX RAIDER

abilities.name: Grab and Go
abilities.text: After attaching a friendly upgrade, this model heals 1, moves up to 4", and may draw a card.

abilities.name: Threatening Demeanor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: Refurbished Shotgun
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or (gun)8".

triggers.name: Wild Shot
triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target. Then, deal 1 damage to another friendly model within range.

triggers.name: Field Kit
triggers.text: After resolving, one friendly model within 3" of the target heals 1.

triggers.name: Risky Maneuver
triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. This model deals 1 irreducible damage to itself. An ally within 3" of this model gains an Adaptable token or an Impact token.

extraction_notes: Refurbished Shotgun has action_type 'variable' due to dynamic range choice between melee and missile range
